title: Software Engineer Intern 2026
descriptionHtml:
About Creatify

Creatify is building the world’s first end-to-end AI advertising agent—a platform that automates the entire video ad lifecycle, from scripting and avatar-led generation to testing, optimization, and publishing across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and more.

In just 18 months, we’ve surpassed $10 million in ARR, serving over 1.5 million users across 10,000+ teams. Leading brands—including Alibaba, HubSpot, Binance, NewsBreak, and Zumper—use Creatify to produce personalized, high-performing video ads in minutes.

We have raised $24M in funding from leading Silicon Valley firms including WndrCo, Kindred Ventures, Millennium New Horizons, NFDG, Comcast Ventures, Creator Ventures, Leadout Capital, Hat Trick Capital, and many more. Check out our latest coverage by Fast Company, TechCrunch, Bloomberg TV, and our recognition as one of IVP Enterprise AI 55 in 2024.

Based in Mountain View, we are a team of passionate AI researchers, engineers, and advertising veterans. Join us in reinventing the advertising industry with AI.

About this role

Creatify is seeking a full-time Software Engineering Intern (Full-Stack) to support our engineering team in building and improving our AI-powered video advertising platform.

The intern will work closely with engineers, product managers, and designers to contribute to real product features across both frontend and backend systems.

This role is intended to provide hands-on learning experience in a fast-paced startup environment while contributing to production-level code and systems.

  • Start Date: prefer to start as soon as possible, this is not a cohort based role.

  • Work Authorization: Candidates must be authorized to work in the U.S. We welcome applicants eligible under CPT or OPT.

Responsibilities

You will be responsible for creating responsive web designs, coding frontends and backends, and collaborating with PMs and designers to deliver features.

Qualifications

  • Proficiency in React, Python, and frameworks like Django or Flask.

  • Familiarity with Docker, SQL, and cloud services like AWS, GCP, or Azure.

  • Previous experience in video, ads, AI is a significant plus.

  • Fast-paced work style. We operate at a high speed, and so should you.

  • Excellent communication, teamwork skills, and problem-solving ability.

  • A genuinely nice person.

We are an equal opportunity employer and highly value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

About Creatify

Creatify is building the world’s first end-to-end AI advertising agent—a platform that automates the entire video ad lifecycle, from scripting and avatar-led generation to testing, optimization, and publishing across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and more.

In just 18 months, we’ve surpassed $10 million in ARR, serving over 1.5 million users across 10,000+ teams. Leading brands—including Alibaba, HubSpot, Binance, NewsBreak, and Zumper—use Creatify to produce personalized, high-performing video ads in minutes.

We have raised $24M in funding from leading Silicon Valley firms including WndrCo, Kindred Ventures, Millennium New Horizons, NFDG, Comcast Ventures, Creator Ventures, Leadout Capital, Hat Trick Capital, and many more. Check out our latest coverage by Fast Company https://www.fastcompany.com/91344416/jeffrey-katzenberg-bets-big-on-ai-video-ads-with-a-15-5-million-investment-in-creatify, TechCrunch https://techcrunch.com/2025/06/02/former-dreamworks-ceo-jeffrey-katzenberg-co-leads-15-5m-series-a-for-ai-video-ad-platform/, Bloomberg TV https://www.bloomberg.com/news/videos/2025-05-28/jeffrey-katzenberg-says-ai-is-not-the-end-of-hollywood-video, and our recognition as one of IVP Enterprise AI 55 in 2024 https://www.ivp.com/content/the-ivp-enterprise-ai-55-2024/.

Based in Mountain View, we are a team of passionate AI researchers, engineers, and advertising veterans. Join us in reinventing the advertising industry with AI.


ABOUT THIS ROLE

Creatify is seeking a full-time Software Engineering Intern (Full-Stack) to support our engineering team in building and improving our AI-powered video advertising platform.

The intern will work closely with engineers, product managers, and designers to contribute to real product features across both frontend and backend systems.

This role is intended to provide hands-on learning experience in a fast-paced startup environment while contributing to production-level code and systems.

 - Start Date: prefer to start as soon as possible, this is not a cohort based role.

 - Work Authorization: Candidates must be authorized to work in the U.S. We welcome applicants eligible under CPT or OPT.


RESPONSIBILITIES

You will be responsible for creating responsive web designs, coding frontends and backends, and collaborating with PMs and designers to deliver features.


QUALIFICATIONS

 - Proficiency in React, Python, and frameworks like Django or Flask.

 - Familiarity with Docker, SQL, and cloud services like AWS, GCP, or Azure.

 - Previous experience in video, ads, AI is a significant plus.

 - Fast-paced work style. We operate at a high speed, and so should you.

 - Excellent communication, teamwork skills, and problem-solving ability.

 - A genuinely nice person.

We are an equal opportunity employer and highly value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.
